text.title: Multi-Machine Offline Cache Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Multi-Machine Offline Cache output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: shared cache via Dropbox/iCloud across machines

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: machines populated with a typed value
cache_dir_per_machine populated with a typed value
cas_algorithm populated with a typed value
offline_grace_days populated with a typed value
activation_limit populated with a typed value
post_expiration_purge_days populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
